initiatives.name: Energy Efficiency Interventions
initiatives.description: Implementation of environment sustainability interventions and optimisation of resource utilization.
initiatives.outcome: Capex investment of 3.13% of total capex for environmental sustainability.

scope3Breakdown.note: Total Scope 3 emissions reported in BRSR.

enrichment.managementCommentary: Today the variety of applications where steel is used necessitates producers to continuously improve quality and offer products with a lesser carbon footprint. JSW Steel is at the forefront of both these trends. We are doubling up on sustainability by controlling our emissions and ensuring multi-pronged digital focus.

forwardLooking.description: Achieve 'No Net Loss' of biodiversity at all operating sites

qualitativePolicies.P1_ethics: Code of Conduct for Board & Senior Management and Policy on Business Conduct.
qualitativePolicies.P3_ohs: People Policy and Health & Safety Policy ensuring a zero-harm vision.
qualitativePolicies.P6_environment: Climate Change Policy, Energy Policy, and Water Resource Management Policy.

steelProduction.note: From plan config (annual report). Gemini derived ~20.9M t from BRSR emissions/intensity — difference may be due to saleable vs crude steel denominator.
